statement: Subtask role — Subtasks are saved inside tasks but are task details/configuration, not a major — Task type, TaskEditor, task factory, validation, task card
affected_modules: src/types/; src/services/api-mappers.ts; src/utils/date.helpers.ts; src/utils/node.helpers.ts; DTO/domain/builder mapping
ux_impact: User configures tasks without cluttering the main builder
